name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual bookkeeping causes errors that lead to cash flow gaps. We automate workflows instead of manual bookkeeping methods.
problem_solved: manual bookkeeping processes lead to errors and inefficiencies
